decisions.title: Canvas V1 Feature Freeze Date
decisions.context: Canvas core features (Make Copy, Sharelinks, Version History, Pass/Fail Functions) are in flight. Need to decide freeze date to stabilize for beta launch vs continuing feature development.

arguments.for: Early freeze enables quality focus, dogfooding time, and clearer beta scope. Supports 'Nail the Core' pillar.
arguments.against: Several UX polish items still pending (DES-191 preferences, sync video panels). May limit initial impression quality.

decisions.title: Sift Edge Performance Requirements Definition
decisions.context: Edge database metrics instrumentation (ENG-10403) and data-batcher throughput improvements (ENG-10402) signal production readiness work. Need formal performance SLAs before broader rollout.

arguments.for: Clear SLAs required for customer commitments. Gov-scale assessment (ENG-10237) shows scalability questions. Supports 'Build the Moat' differentiation.
arguments.against: May delay edge deployments while benchmarking. Current throughput improvements already underway.

decisions.title: Compaction Architecture Review Required
decisions.context: Multiple critical compaction issues: sort key mismatches causing fragmentation (ENG-10308), ENOSPC errors (ENG-10371), gov-scale performance concerns (ENG-10237). Core data reliability at risk.
decisions.blockedBy: Need production incident analysis and architecture review meeting scheduled

arguments.for: System stability critical for all products. Fragmentation directly impacts query performance and customer experience. Immediate action needed.
arguments.against: Deep architecture changes may destabilize other systems. Could delay feature work across teams.

decisions.title: Explore V2 Data Selector Launch Gate
decisions.context: Data selector UI polish (ENG-9017) and drag-drop family stats (ENG-10404) show Explore V2 nearing completion. Composable chart instrumentation (ENG-9356) ready. Need go/no-go for GA launch.

arguments.for: Core 'Nail the Core' product. UX improvements complete, telemetry ready. Customer demand high. Drives North Star metric (decisions captured).
arguments.against: Cold-storage instrumentation (ENG-10394) still pending. May impact performance visibility for large datasets.

decisions.title: Python Rules Production Blockers Triage
decisions.context: Critical bugs in rules engine: ghost events with counter>97 (ENG-9978), report graph condition display errors (ENG-9979), query bypass issues (ENG-10257). Customer-facing reliability concerns.

arguments.for: Rules are core decision-making tool. Bugs directly undermine 'Signal>Evidence>Decision' strategy. Customer trust at stake.
arguments.against: May require architectural changes to counter logic. Could delay Python Rules advanced features roadmap.

timeAudit.weekSummary: High engineering execution velocity (30 active tickets). Critical infrastructure issues demand immediate leadership attention (compaction, rules bugs). Canvas and Explore V2 on track for Q2 milestones.
alerts: Compaction fragmentation crisis requires immediate architecture review (3 critical bugs)
Python Rules reliability at risk - 3 customer-facing bugs open, impacts core strategy
Canvas feature scope creep risk - 4 parallel features without defined freeze date
Sift Edge lacks formal performance requirements before production scaling

events.title: Compaction Architecture Emergency Review
events.description: Critical: Address fragmentation, ENOSPC, and gov-scale performance. System stability gate.
